title: MTR Escalator to Heaven Sign
description: Signs based on the "To Heaven only" meme for MTR mod!
body:
# MTR Escalator to Heaven Sign
Adds 2 new signs based on the "To Heaven only" meme.
![sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da0237937cdaf1cf65cf7a071588090e02000eb2.png)
## Signs
- "To Heaven only"
- "To Hell only"
